hero.body: Clone it, run pnpm dev, and instantly see how apps, shared packages, and Turborepo orchestrate your entire stack.

architecture.title: Everything has a place
architecture.description: Applications ship features. Packages share code. Tooling enforces standards. Each workspace has a clear job inside the starter.

pipeline.title: Turborepo handles the graph
pipeline.description: Every task runs in the right order with caching and parallel execution. Change shared code and only the affected surfaces rebuild.

features.title: Batteries included,
features.description: Every piece is replaceable. Swap frameworks, add packages, or trim the stack back without losing the workspace foundation.

workspaceProtocols.title: Workspace Protocols
workspaceProtocols.body: Internal dependencies resolve locally with pnpm workspace links, which keeps versions aligned and avoids phantom installs.

sharedUiPackage.title: Shared UI Package
sharedUiPackage.body: The frontend imports from packages/ui like a real library, so the starter shows package boundaries instead of hiding them.

typedApiSample.title: Typed API Sample
typedApiSample.body: NestJS and tRPC already prove the path between the web app and backend without extra scaffolding.

parallelExecution.title: Parallel Execution
parallelExecution.body: Turbo runs the right tasks together and respects dependencies automatically, so local workflows stay fast as the repo grows.

reusableConfig.title: Reusable Config
reusableConfig.body: TypeScript baselines live in packages/config-typescript and can be shared across apps, libraries, and future tooling.

starterReadyStructure.title: Starter-Ready Structure
starterReadyStructure.body: The folder layout is already shaped for real teams: applications on top, shared packages beneath, tooling at the root.

quickstart.title: Running in ninety seconds
quickstart.description: Three commands. No global installs, no scavenger hunt through config files, and no guesswork about what runs where.

cloneRepo.title: Clone the repo
cloneRepo.body: Pull the template down and install every workspace dependency in one shot.

startDeveloping.title: Start developing
startDeveloping.body: Turbo boots the web app, API, and package watchers with the correct dependency order.

verifyGraph.title: Verify the graph
verifyGraph.body: Build and typecheck across the workspace to confirm the monorepo is healthy before customizing it.

cta.body: Open source. MIT licensed. Built with Turborepo + pnpm.

web.body: The visual entrypoint for the starter. It renders the landing page, hosts the React islands, and proves workspace wiring from the first run.

api.body: A typed backend sample that gives the starter a real server path instead of a placeholder architecture diagram.

ui.body: Reusable UI primitives that can be imported across apps as a real workspace package instead of copied local code.

types.body: Common interfaces and DTOs that keep frontend and backend examples grounded in a typed, shared source of truth.
